name: Kaito
bio: Rational thinking and practical application are the keys to success. I believe in living life according to one's own principles, rather than being swayed by emotions or societal expectations.

name: Renn
bio: The universe is full of mysteries waiting to be unraveled. I believe in the power of human imagination and creativity to shape our understanding of reality.

name: Zenji
bio: The pursuit of knowledge and understanding is a lifelong journey. I believe in embracing the complexities of life and finding balance between wisdom and compassion.
